import requests
import json


def create_employee(arg):

    
    headers = {
        'X-API-KEY': arg['Api_key'],
    }

    url = arg['url']
    
    data = {

        'employee[person_type]': arg['persontype'],
        'employee[first_name]': arg['firstname'],
        'employee[last_name]': arg['lastname'],
        'employee[employee_ref]': arg['employeeref'],
        'employee[email]':arg['email'],
        'employee[work_mobile]': arg['workmobile'],
        'employee[job_title]': arg['jobtitle'],
        'employee[join_date]': arg['joindate'],
   
    }
    

    response = requests.post(url,headers=headers, data=data)
    print(response.json())
